title: conophallus planus
intro: Conophallus planus, also known as the club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae, which includes several species of small, non-vascular plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Conophallus planus include its ability to aid in the healing process, reduce pain and swelling, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Conophallus planus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
